commands.title: SANS Triage Collection
commands.description: Rapid artifact collection using the !SANS_Triage target.

commands.title: SANS Triage → Network Share
commands.description: Collect triage artifacts to a UNC path or external drive.

commands.title: Collect + Parse with EZTools
commands.description: Triage collection then run !EZParser modules on output.

commands.title: List Available Targets
commands.description: Show installed KAPE targets before running a collection.

commands.title: Running Processes
commands.description: List processes on an endpoint via VQL.
commands.command: SELECT Pid, Name, CommandLine, Username, Exe FROM pslist()

commands.title: Network Connections
commands.description: Active connections and listening ports.
commands.command: SELECT Pid, Name, Laddr, Raddr, Status FROM netstat()

commands.title: Unsigned Binary Check
commands.description: Find executables missing valid Authenticode signatures.

commands.title: Collect Forensic Artifacts
commands.description: Run a built-in artifact collection (adjust artifact name as needed).

commands.title: Acquire Memory Dump
commands.description: Capture physical memory to a raw image file.

commands.title: Acquire (Write-Protected Driver)
commands.description: Memory capture using the recommended write-protected acquisition method.

commands.title: System Info
commands.description: Identify OS, kernel version, and architecture from the dump.

commands.title: Process List
commands.description: Enumerate running processes at time of capture.

commands.title: Process Tree
commands.description: Parent-child process relationships for spotting anomalies.

commands.title: Network Connections
commands.description: Active connections and listening ports from memory.

commands.title: Injected Code (malfind)
commands.description: Find suspicious memory regions and injected code.

commands.title: Process Command Lines
commands.description: Recover command-line arguments for processes.

commands.title: Mount Memory Image
commands.description: Mount a memory dump as a virtual filesystem for browsing.

commands.title: Mount to Drive Letter
commands.description: Mount memory image to M: for Explorer and tool access.

commands.title: Run Volatility Plugin via MemProcFS
commands.description: Execute a Volatility plugin through the MemProcFS API.

commands.title: EvtxECmd — Parse EVTX
commands.description: Parse Windows event logs to CSV for timeline review.

commands.title: PECmd — Parse Prefetch
commands.description: Parse Prefetch files for program execution evidence.

commands.title: MFTECmd — Parse $MFT
commands.description: Parse the Master File Table for filesystem timeline.

commands.title: AmcacheParser
commands.description: Parse Amcache for program execution artifacts.

commands.title: AppCompatCacheParser
commands.description: Parse ShimCache for execution history.

commands.title: Create Disk Image
commands.description: Bit-for-bit copy of a source device to an image file.
commands.command: sudo dd if=/dev/sdb of=/cases/disk.img bs=64k conv=noerror,sync status=progress

commands.title: Image + SHA256 Hash
commands.description: Create image and write SHA256 hash for chain of custody.
commands.command: sudo dd if=/dev/sdb bs=64k conv=noerror,sync status=progress | tee /cases/disk.img | sha256sum | tee /cases/disk.img.sha256

commands.title: Verify Image Hash
commands.description: Confirm image integrity against a saved hash.
